Create a risk parity portfolio

Source: R/utils-create_risk_parity_portfolio.R
create_risk_parity_portfolio.Rd

Create a risk parity portfolio

Usage

create_risk_parity_portfolio(
  universe_m_d_ref,
  covariance_matrix,
  rp_method = "cyclical-spinu",
  exp_ret_score_tilt = NULL,
  exp_ret_score_tilt_eta = NULL,
  liquidity_constraint_policy = NULL,
  turnover_constraint_policy = NULL,
  concentration_constraint_policy = NULL,
  verbose = TRUE
)

Arguments

universe_m_d_ref

A dataframe with tickers, is_eligible and final_signal columns generated by filter_stock_universe

covariance_matrix

The covariance matrix of all eligible stocks in universe_m_d_ref.

rp_method

The method used to calculate the risk parity weights. Default is "cyclical-spinu". See riskParityPortfolio::riskParityPortfolio for more options.

exp_ret_score_tilt

One of 'none', 'inner' or 'final', indicating whether to apply the exp_ret_score tilt during the risk parity optimization ('inner'), after the optimization ('final'), or not at all ('none').

exp_ret_score_tilt_eta

The numeric tilt to apply to the risk parity weights based on the exp_ret_score column in universe_m_d_ref. If NULL, no tilt is applied.

liquidity_constraint_policy

A list containing liquidity constraint parameters. See generate_box_constraints for details.

turnover_constraint_policy

A list containing turnover constraint parameters. See generate_box_constraints for details.

concentration_constraint_policy

A list containing concentration constraint parameters. See generate_box_constraints for details.

verbose

If TRUE, will print messages to the console

On this page
